files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,88 @@
+{
+  "name": "@claude-flow/codex",
+  "version": "3.0.0-alpha.1",
+  "description": "Codex CLI integration for Claude Flow - OpenAI Codex platform adapter",
+  "type": "module",
+  "main": "./dist/index.js",
+  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
+  "bin": {
+    "claude-flow-codex": "./dist/cli.js"
+  },
+  "exports": {
+    ".": {
+      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/index.js"
+    },
+    "./generators": {
+      "types": "./dist/generators/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/generators/index.js"
+    },
+    "./templates": {
+      "types": "./dist/templates/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/templates/index.js"
+    },
+    "./migrations": {
+      "types": "./dist/migrations/index.d.ts",
+      "import": "./dist/migrations/index.js"
+    }
+  },
+  "files": [
+    "dist",
+    "templates"
+  ],
+  "scripts": {
+    "build": "tsc",
+    "dev": "tsc --watch",
+    "lint": "eslint src --ext .ts",
+    "test": "vitest",
+    "prepublishOnly": "npm run build"
+  },
+  "keywords": [
+    "codex",
+    "openai",
+    "claude-flow",
+    "coflow",
+    "agents",
+    "skills",
+    "AGENTS.md",
+    "agentic-ai"
+  ],
+  "author": "rUv",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow.git",
+    "directory": "v3/@claude-flow/codex"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow#readme",
+  "bugs": {
+    "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow/issues"
+  },
+  "engines": {
+    "node": ">=18"
+  },
+  "peerDependencies": {
+    "@claude-flow/cli": "^3.0.0-alpha.1"
+  },
+  "peerDependenciesMeta": {
+    "@claude-flow/cli": {
+      "optional": true
+    }
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "commander": "^12.0.0",
+    "fs-extra": "^11.2.0",
+    "chalk": "^5.3.0",
+    "inquirer": "^9.2.0",
+    "yaml": "^2.4.0",
+    "toml": "^3.0.0",
+    "@iarna/toml": "^2.2.5"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@types/fs-extra": "^11.0.4",
+    "@types/node": "^20.0.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.4.0",
+    "vitest": "^1.4.0",
+    "eslint": "^8.57.0"
+  }
+}
